tracks.meaning: the material or information presented in a book, website, broadcast, or other medium
the substance or matter of something, as opposed to its style or form
a state of peaceful satisfaction with one's situation or circumstances
to express satisfaction or agreement with something
relating to a medical condition or procedure involving satisfactory therapeutic outcomes
digital material such as text, images, video, or audio distributed through digital platforms
to consent to or agree with the terms of a legal document or agreement
the capacity or amount that a container can hold
